contract_claim: `sendDapRequest` always returns `{} as T` (line 454) — an empty stub — regardless of the command. The method comment says 'ProxyManager handles actual communication', but callers invoking this method expecting a real DAP response will silently receive an empty object. This is a stub, not a functional implementation, and calling code that relies on the return value will get incorrect results.
